subject: What I'm gonna give you...
body:
I'm giving away something that's better than an NFT and less than a Bitcoin…to Every. Single. Person. Live.

BUT - only if you're at the book launch live.

If this were a Marvel movie, think of the Money Model types as the infinity stones, and this, the thing I'm giving away, as the gauntlet that allows you to wield them.

It's that powerful.

If you want MY SECRET GIVEAWAY, you only have to do two things:

- Register for the launch here
- Show up live on August 16th at 9am PT/12pm ET

More to come,

Alex.
